tasks.label: git-checkin-and-tag-v0.9
args: Set-Location .; if (git tag --list v0.9) { Write-Error 'Tag v0.9 already exists'; exit 1 }; git commit -m 'Release v0.9: auth hardening, frontend QA export, and deployment updates'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git tag -a v0.9 -m 'version 0.9'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git show --no-patch --oneline HEAD; git tag --list v0.9

tasks.label: git-checkin-and-tag-v0.9-safe
args: Set-Location .; if (git tag --list v0.9) { Write-Error "Tag v0.9 already exists"; exit 1 }; git commit -m v0.9_release; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git tag -a v0.9 -m version_0.9; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git show --no-patch --oneline HEAD; git tag --list v0.9

tasks.label: git-push-main-and-v0.9
args: Set-Location .; git push origin main; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git push origin v0.9

tasks.label: helm-template-dev-check
args: Set-Location deploy/helm/maxopenballoon; helm template maxopenballoon-dev . -f values-dev.yaml | Select-String -Pattern '^kind: Deployment|^kind: Service|name: maxopenballoon-'

tasks.label: helm-template-dev-check-safe
args: cd /d deploy\helm\maxopenballoon && helm template maxopenballoon-dev . -f values-dev.yaml > ..\..\..\.tmp\helm-dev-render.yaml && findstr /R /C:"^kind: Deployment" /C:"^kind: Service" /C:"^  name: maxopenballoon-" ..\..\..\.tmp\helm-dev-render.yaml

tasks.label: release-v0.9.1
args: Set-Location .; git status --short; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git add deploy/helm/maxopenballoon/templates/deployment.yaml deploy/helm/maxopenballoon/templates/service.yaml deploy/helm/maxopenballoon/values.yaml deploy/helm/maxopenballoon/values-dev.yaml deploy/helm/maxopenballoon/values-stage.yaml deploy/helm/maxopenballoon/values-prod.yaml; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git commit -m v0.9.1_helm_service_matrix; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; if (git tag --list v0.9.1) { Write-Error "Tag v0.9.1 already exists"; exit 1 }; git tag -a v0.9.1 -m version_0.9.1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git push origin main; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git push origin v0.9.1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git show --no-patch --oneline HEAD; git tag --list v0.9.1

tasks.label: review-pending-diff
